questionSubmitted: What do you mean by "two grains of salt"?
answer: It’s a reminder to myself to stay curious and hold things lightly. Take what helps, leave the rest, and there's always more to learn.

questionSubmitted: If you have infinite resources in your life, what would you do?
answer: The one thing I care about the most is education and investing into the future. I will learn the best way to create a huge network of people who care about this topic equally, and improve the system in such a way. It is important to mention that despite such fantasy, we still live in the real life; but this will not defeat me. I will be playing the game while hoping to improve it.
